faq.answer.about.whatIsLU: Is ardán é Literary Universe do scríbhneoirí agus do léitheoirí chun scéalta agus domhan a chruthú, a roinnt agus a aimsiú.
faq.question.about.difference: Cad é an difríocht idir Literary Universe agus ardáin léitheoireachta ar líne eile?
faq.answer.about.difference: Is ardán uile-i-amháin é Literary Universe, rud a chiallaíonn go bhfuil uirlisí ann don scríbhneoireacht, don léitheoireacht, don domhan-thógáil, agus don phobal-thógáil. Is é an príomhdhifríocht ná go bhfuil na huirlisí seo go léir san áireamh le chéile ar aon ardán amháin, agus an idirnaisc atá eatarthu.
faq.answer.about.dataLocation: Stóráiltear sonraí Literary Universe ar fhreastalaithe i Stáit Aontaithe Mheiriceá, go sonrach i réigiún AWS us-east-1.
faq.answer.about.incorporation: Tá Literary Universe corpraithe sa Phoblacht na Seice. Is féidir leat teacht ar thuilleadh sonraí ar an leathanach 'Faoinár dtaobh'.
faq.question.about.roadmap: Cad iad na chéad chéimeanna eile do Literary Universe?
faq.answer.about.roadmap: Tá sé seo ag athrú i gcónaí. Féach ar ár mbóthar-phlean le haghaidh tuilleadh sonraí.
faq.question.settings.changeTheme: Conas a athraím cuma Literary Universe?
faq.answer.settings.changeTheme: Is féidir le húsáideoirí cláraithe a dtéama a athrú i socruithe an chuntais faoin rannán "téamú an tsuímh". Tá téama éadrom agus téama dorcha ar fáil. Mura bhfuil tú cláraithe, déanaimid iarracht a chinneadh cén téama atá le cur ar fáil duit bunaithe ar shocruithe do bhrabhsálaí agus do chórais oibriúcháin.
faq.answer.settings.changeAvatar: Is féidir leat d'avatar a athrú sna socruithe próifíle.
faq.answer.settings.changeLanguage: Is féidir leat teanga Literary Universe a athrú sna socruithe cuntais.
faq.question.settings.translationMistake: Fuair mé botún sa téacs ar an suíomh gréasáin, cá bhféadfainn é a thuairisciú?
faq.answer.settings.translationMistake: Tá ár gcomhaid teanga go léir ar fáil ar GitHub. Is féidir leat fadhb a thuairisciú ansin nó sa rannóg Míreanna den fheidback, nó más mian leat, is féidir leat í a réiteach díreach tú féin trínár leathanach Crowdin.
faq.question.discovery.explain: Cad is é an rannóg Discovery?
faq.answer.discovery.explain: Is sa rannóg Discovery is féidir leat teacht ar scéalta nua, cruinní, blaganna, grúpaí agus ábhar eile. Is áit í chun rudaí nua a fhiosrú agus a aimsiú le léamh agus le baint taitnimh astu.
faq.question.discovery.filters: How can I filter stories by genre, language, or tags?
faq.answer.discovery.filters: Use the filter panel at the top of the Discovery search page to narrow down stories by genre, language, tags, and more.
faq.answer.discovery.recommendations: Recommendations are based on your reading history, followed authors, and genres you like.
faq.question.discovery.hide: Can I hide or block certain stories or users from Discovery?
faq.answer.discovery.hide: Yes, explicit content is by default blocked and you can filter search results to your likes. In your settings you can also disable specific genres by default. More options will come in the future.
faq.question.discovery.inappropriateCont: How do I report inappropriate content in Discovery?
faq.answer.discovery.inappropriateConten: If you find inappropriate content, click the 'Report' button (sometimes just a flag icon) on the story or user profile. Our moderators will review your report as soon as possible.
faq.question.writer.howToCreateStory: Conas a chruthaím scéal nua in Literary Universe?
faq.answer.writer.howToCreateStory: Is féidir leat scéal nua a chruthú trí dhul go dtí an cheardlann agus cliceáil ar cheann de na cnaipí cruthaigh nó trí dhul go dtí an príomhleathanach cruthaithe áit ar féidir leat scéal neamhspleách nua nó ficsean leantóra a roghnú. Chun scéal nua a chruthú i gcruinne, téigh ar dtús go dtí an chruinne sin agus ansin roghnaigh "scéalta" ar an deais agus ar an gcéad leathanach eile, cliceáil an cnaipe mór dearg ar thaobh na láimhe deise de theideal an leathanaigh. Iarrfar ort sonraí do scéil a líonadh isteach agus ansin is féidir leat tosú ag scríobh.
faq.question.writer.schedule: Conas a sceidealaim caibidil le heisiúint in Literary Universe?
faq.answer.writer.schedule: Is féidir leat sceideal a dhéanamh chun caibidil a fhoilsiú trí chliceáil ar an gcnaipe foilsithe san eagarthóir caibidle. Taispeánfar fuinneog mhodal ina mbeidh an rogha agat scaoileadh a sceidealú nó foilsiú láithreach. Má roghnaíonn tú scaoileadh a sceidealú, iarrfar ort an dáta agus an t-am a theastaíonn uait an chaibidil a fhoilsiú a roghnú. Molaimid caibidlí a sceidealú ar a laghad 24 uair an chloig roimh ré chun am a thabhairt do léitheoirí ullmhú don chaibidil nua, agus iad a fhoilsiú ar an lá agus an t-am céanna den tseachtain.
faq.question.reader.creativeTypes: Cad é an difríocht idir an Chruinne, Scéalta agus Ficsin Lucht Leantach?
faq.answer.reader.creativeTypes: Is áit í an chruinne inar féidir leat teacht ar na scéalta go léir agus ar ábhar eile a bhaineann le saol liteartha ar leith. Is scéalta neamhspleácha iad na scéalta, nó cuid de chruinne. Is scéal é an Ficsean Lucht Leantóra atá bunaithe ar chruinne liteartha eile a chruthaigh duine éigin eile.
faq.question.reader.navigation: How do I navigate between chapters and sections while reading?
faq.answer.reader.navigation: Use the navigation arrows or the chapter list to move between chapters and sections. You can also use keyboard shortcuts for faster navigation.
faq.question.reader.settings: How do I adjust reading settings like font size or theme?
faq.answer.reader.settings: Click the settings icon in the reader toolbar to change font size, theme (light/dark), and other display options. You can also set your default preferences in your settings.
faq.question.reader.bookmarks: How do I bookmark my place in a story?
faq.answer.reader.bookmarks: Bookmarks are set automatically as you read. On the story overview you can see which chapters have you read and when.
faq.question.reader.progress: How do I track my reading progress?
faq.answer.reader.progress: Your progress is saved automatically and shown as a progress bar or percentage in the reader and your library. On the story overview you can see which chapters have you read and when.
faq.question.reader.accessibility: What accessibility features are available in the reader?
faq.answer.reader.accessibility: The reader supports adjustable font sizes, Dyslexic font, ruler that tracks your mouse, differentiating paragraph colors, dark and light themes, keyboard navigation, and screen reader compatibility.
faq.question.reader.supportedFormats: What formats are supported by the reader?
faq.answer.reader.supportedFormats: The reader supports stories, universes, and other content created on Literary Universe. External formats like EPUB or PDF are not currently supported.
faq.question.reader.troubleshooting: What should I do if the reader is not working correctly?
faq.answer.reader.troubleshooting: Try refreshing the page or clearing your browser cache. If problems persist, contact support with details about your issue.
faq.answer.workshop.explain: Is sa Cheardlann is féidir leat scéalta nua, ficsean leantóra, cruinní agus ábhar eile a chruthú. Is áit í chun d'ábhar cruthaitheach a scríobh, a chur in eagar agus a bhainistiú.
faq.question.workshop.creativeTypes: Cad é an difríocht idir an Chruinne, Scéalta agus Ficsin Lucht Leantach?
faq.answer.workshop.creativeTypes: Is é an Chruinne an príomhionad do do chruinne liteartha, ina gcruthaíonn tú scéalta a bhfuil suíomh coiteann acu sa domhan liteartha céanna, ina mbainistíonn tú ciclipéid le gach mionsonra de do shaol féin agus ina ndéanann tú aon rud eile a bhaineann leis. Is scéal é Ficsean Lucht Leantóra a bhíonn bunaithe ar scéal nó ar chruinne eile a chruthaigh duine éigin eile. Is scéalta iad scéalta neamhspleácha nach bhfuil nasctha le haon chruinne, bain úsáid as seo mar shampla le haghaidh filíochta nó saothar liteartha atá suite sa domhan réadúil gan mórán carachtar ná mionsonraí tumthacha a d'éileodh ciclipéid nó buntáistí eile a bhaineann le cruinne a bheith ann.
faq.question.workshop.continueStory: Conas a leanfaidh mé ar aghaidh le scéal a cruthaíodh cheana?
faq.answer.workshop.continueStory: Is féidir leat leanúint le scéal a cruthaíodh cheana trí dhul chuig an gceardlann agus an scéal is mian leat a leanúint a roghnú, nó más scéal i gcruinne é, ní mór duit dul chuig an gcruinne ar dtús agus an scéal a roghnú ón liosta scéalta. Ar dheais an scéil, is féidir leat cliceáil ansin ar an gcaibidil is mian leat leanúint ar aghaidh ag scríobh nó caibidil nua a chruthú.
faq.answer.workshop.whatIsALicense: Is doiciméad dlíthiúil é ceadúnas scéil a shainmhíníonn an chaoi ar féidir le daoine eile do scéal/do chruinne a úsáid. Is bealach é chun do chearta a chosaint agus chun a shainiú an chaoi ar féidir le daoine eile do shaothar a úsáid.
faq.question.workshop.licenses: Cé na ceadúnais atá ar fáil?
faq.answer.workshop.licenses: Cuirimid réimse ceadúnas ar fáil le roghnú astu. Agus saothar nua á chruthú, beidh cnaipe sa rannóg ceadúnas a liostálfaidh na ceadúnais uile atá ar fáil lena sonraí iomlána. Go ginearálta, cuirimid cosaintí cóipchirt iomlána agus ceadúnais Creative Commons ar fáil.
faq.answer.workshop.guildOwnership: Léiríonn comhaltacht gild gur le heagraíocht an saothar. D'fhéadfadh sé seo a bheith ina fhoilsitheoir nó ina chineál eile cuideachta nó eagraíochta neamhbhrabúis. Is gnách go mbíonn úinéireacht an tsaothair beagán níos casta agus d'fhéadfadh sé nach mbeadh smacht iomlán ag an údar air; is é is brí leis go príomha ná go ndéantar an saothar a bhainistiú tríd an eagraíocht agus ní ag an údar óna chuntas pearsanta.
faq.question.workshop.howToInviteCollabo: Conas is féidir liom comhoibrithe a thabhairt isteach do scéal/chruinne?
faq.answer.workshop.howToInviteCollabora: Is féidir leat comhoibrithe a thabhairt chuig do scéal/do chruinne trí dhul go dtí painéal an scéil/na cruinne agus an cnaipe "comhoibrithe" a chliceáil. Is féidir leat úsáideoirí eile a thabhairt chun comhoibriú ar do scéal/do chruinne ansin trína n-ainm úsáideora a chur isteach agus an ról is mian leat a shannadh dóibh a roghnú.
faq.question.workshop.howToTranslation: Conas is féidir liom mo scéal nó mo chruinne a aistriú?
faq.answer.workshop.howToTranslation: Is féidir leat do scéal nó do chruinne a aistriú trí dhul go dtí painéal an scéil/na cruinne agus an cnaipe "Aistriúcháin" a chliceáil. Ansin is féidir leat aistriúchán nua a chur le do shaothar agus má tá duine éigin agat chun an t-aistriúchán a dhéanamh, is féidir leat cuireadh a thabhairt dóibh páirt a ghlacadh ann. As sin, is féidir leat na haistriúcháin a bhainistiú tú féin freisin.
faq.question.workshop.betaReaders: Cad is Léitheoirí Béite ann agus cén cuspóir atá acu i mo scéal?
faq.answer.workshop.betaReaders: Is iad léitheoirí béite daoine a léann do scéal sula bhfoilsítear é agus a thugann aiseolas duit. Is féidir leo cabhrú leat teacht ar bhotúin, smaointe a thabhairt duit le haghaidh feabhsúcháin, agus cabhrú leat do scéal a dhéanamh níos fearr.
faq.question.workshop.hiatus: Cad is sos ann i stádas na scéil?
faq.answer.workshop.hiatus: Is stádas do scéil é Sos a léiríonn go bhfuil tú ag tógáil sos ó bheith ag scríobh agus ag foilsiú caibidlí nua. Is bealach é chun a chur in iúl do do léitheoirí nach bhfuil tú ag obair go gníomhach ar an scéal faoi láthair. Socraítear an stádas seo go huathoibríoch tar éis 6 mhí gan aon chaibidil nua. Tar éis 6 mhí eile d'éagníomhaíocht, cuirfear an scéal ar ceal.
faq.question.workshop.finished: Conas a léirím go bhfuil mo scéal críochnaithe?
faq.answer.workshop.finished: Is féidir leat a chur in iúl go bhfuil do scéal críochnaithe trí dhul go dtí painéal rialaithe an scéil agus ag an mbun tá cnaipe glas ann a deir "Athraigh stádas an scéil go Críochnaithe". Leis seo, marcálfar an scéal mar scéal críochnaithe, cuirfear an leathanach deireanach in oiriúint chun a chur in iúl do na léitheoirí go bhfuil deireadh leis an scéal, agus molfar dóibh breathnú ar do shaothair eile. Taispeánfaidh sé seo freisin sa rannóg 'Discovery' go bhfuil an scéal críochnaithe, rud a fhágfaidh go mbeidh do scéal níos feiceálaí do léitheoirí atá ag lorg scéalta críochnaithe.
faq.question.workshop.seo: Cén úsáid a bhaintear as SEO-Friendly-Address i suíomhanna éagsúla?
faq.answer.workshop.seo: Is bealach é SEO-Friendly-Address chun do scéal, do chruinne, nó do phostáil bhlag a dhéanamh níos feiceálaí d'inneall cuardaigh agus URL níos fusa le léamh a chruthú do dhaoine. Is bealach é chun do shaothar a dhéanamh níos infhionnta agus chun cabhrú le daoine do shaothar a aimsiú nuair a bhíonn siad ag cuardach rud éigin cosúil leis.
faq.question.workshop.descriptionLength: What is the optimal length for story and universe descriptions?
faq.answer.workshop.descriptionLength: Aim for a length of 150-160 characters to ensure your description provides enough information without being truncated in search results. This helps improve your work's visibility on search engines and social media platforms. A well-crafted description within this range will display fully in Google search results and social media previews, making it more likely to attract readers.
faq.question.workshop.createProject: How do I start a new universe in the Workshop?
faq.answer.workshop.createProject: Go to the Workshop and click on the 'Create' button, then select an universe. You can start a new standalone story, fan fiction, or a story within a universe.
faq.question.workshop.editingTools: What editing tools are available in the Workshop?
faq.answer.workshop.editingTools: The Workshop is the creative center where you control your content. At the top you can create universes and standalone stories. From there on you select your work and more options will open to you. Universe will present you with the option to create stories in it, manage universe encyclopedia, universe page, forums, collaboration and much more. With stories you will have a full suite of tools to write in a WYSIWYG editor, manage collaborators, sharing, version management, etc.
faq.question.workshop.story: How do I create a new story in the Workshop?
faq.answer.workshop.story: Go to the Workshop and click on the 'Create' button, then select a story. If you haven't written any standalone story there will be a button in that section to take you straight to story creation. For stories in a universe, select that universe, then click on the 'Stories' button and there you can create a story that will be set in that universe.
faq.answer.workshop.saveDrafts: Drafts are saved automatically as you write, and you can also manually save your progress.
faq.question.workshop.collaboration: How does collaboration work in the Workshop?
faq.answer.workshop.collaboration: You can invite others to collaborate on your story or universe. Use the 'Collaborators' feature to add co-authors, translators, beta readers or editors (this role is in development).
faq.question.workshop.revisions: How do I manage revisions and history?
faq.answer.workshop.revisions: Every time you create a revision it is saved in the database. You can view comments on previous revisions through the editor or in version history.
faq.question.workshop.exporting: How can I export my work from the Workshop?
faq.answer.workshop.exporting: We are currently working on the export feature and publication on other platforms (for non-exclusive works).
faq.question.workshop.troubleshooting: What if the Workshop is not saving or loading my work?
faq.answer.workshop.troubleshooting: Check if there are any error messages visible anywhere, then check your internet connection and try refreshing the page. If issues persist, contact support for help.
faq.question.library.addItem: How do I add a story or universe to my library?
faq.answer.library.addItem: You can add a story or universe to your library by clicking the 'Add to Library' button on the story or universe page. Once added, it will appear in your library for easy access and you will get notified about any developments with that story or universe.
faq.question.library.removeItem: How do I remove something from my library?
faq.answer.library.removeItem: Go to your library or that universe or story, find the item you wish to remove, and click the 'Remove' or trash icon next to it.
faq.question.library.sync: Why is my library not syncing across devices?
faq.answer.library.sync: Make sure you are logged in with the same account on all devices. If issues persist, try logging out and back in, or contact support.
faq.question.library.share: Can I share my library or make it public?
faq.answer.library.share: Currently, your library is private and only visible to you. You can use public reading lists to prepare what you want to share. We are working on features where you will be able to share these in the near future.
faq.question.library.missing: How do I recover missing items in my library?
faq.answer.library.missing: If you notice missing items, try refreshing the page or logging out and back in. If the problem persists, please contact support.
faq.question.library.deletedStory: What happens if a story is deleted by the author?
faq.answer.library.deletedStory: Published stories can not be deleted by the author, but there are some exceptions like copyright and rules violations. If that is the case then the story will no longer be accessible or visible in your library. For other cases of copyrighted material the story might no longer be accessible publicly or for new readers, but if you have bought the story or added it to your library you will still be able to access it.
faq.question.encyclopedia.creating: How do I create a new encyclopedia entry?
faq.answer.encyclopedia.creating: Go to the Encyclopedia section and click the 'Add Entry' button in the menu or in the specific category of the menu. Fill in the details and save your entry.
faq.question.encyclopedia.editing: How do I edit or update an encyclopedia entry?
faq.answer.encyclopedia.editing: Open the entry you want to edit and click the 'Edit' button. Make your changes and save.
faq.question.encyclopedia.categories: Can I organize entries into categories?
faq.answer.encyclopedia.categories: Yes, you can assign categories and parent entries to entries when creating or editing them for better organization.
faq.question.encyclopedia.links: Can I link encyclopedia entries to stories or universes?
faq.answer.encyclopedia.links: Yes, you can link entries to related stories, universes, or other encyclopedia entries.
faq.question.encyclopedia.visibility: Who can see my encyclopedia entries?
faq.answer.encyclopedia.visibility: You can set entries or part of entries to be public or private.
faq.question.encyclopedia.troubleshootin: What if I can't find or edit an entry?
faq.answer.encyclopedia.troubleshooting: Try refreshing the page. If the issue persists, check your permissions or contact support.
